prompt: 'Flip the guest mattress' currently repeats monthly — change it to repeat every 2 weeks instead.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='RQrescheduleTmpl000001' AND start=2 AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>fu</key><integer>256</integer>%' AND CAST(rt1_recurrenceRule AS TEXT) LIKE '%<key>fa</key><integer>2</integer>%'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Flip the guest mattress'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE uuid='RQrescheduleInst000001' AND rt1_repeatingTemplate='RQrescheduleTmpl000001' AND rt1_recurrenceRule IS NULL

pseudoScript: things todo reschedule-repeat "$(things show "$(things search "guest mattress" --json | jq -r '.data[0].uuid')" --json | jq -r '.data.detail.repeating.templateUuid')" --frequency weekly --interval 2 --dangerously-drive-gui
